headlines.headline: Zrovex Industries loses key contract in Central Europe to competitor

sentiment.reasoning: Losing a key contract will negatively impact revenue and market share for Zrovex Industries.

sentiment.reasoning: Raising full-year guidance due to robust demand indicates stronger expected financial performance for Zrovov Advisors.

sentiment.reasoning: Record quarterly revenue with significant year-over-year growth indicates strong financial performance for Plevyl Advisors.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
